description: A photograph of two rows of brick-shaped packages wrapped in tan and white tape, stacked on a surface. A printed placard above them shows a Customs and Border Protection field-operations seal and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Office of Field Operations, Laredo Field Office, Port of Eagle Pass, TX.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Office of Field Operations; Laredo Field Office; Port of Eagle Pass, TX
